title: T-015 — Idempotency helper: server-side R14 transaction_id cache
prompt:
# T-015 — R14 idempotency helper

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §5.1#4, §12.4 R14, §7.1 FR-08-E1-008

## Goal
Implement a reusable server helper `withIdempotency(transactionId, fn)` for Server Actions / route handlers that caches successful response bodies for 1 hour keyed by transaction_id and returns the cached response on replay (R14).

## Implementation contract
Create packages/idempotency/src/with-idempotency.ts exposing `withIdempotency<T>(transactionId: string, fn: () => Promise<T>): Promise<T>`. Backing store: a Postgres table idempotency_cache (transaction_id UUID PK, response JSONB, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ, expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()+'1 hour'). On call: SELECT cached row WHERE transaction_id matches AND expires_at > now() — if hit, return JSON; else run fn, INSERT row with response, return. Validate transaction_id is UUID v7. Add unit tests for cache-miss-then-hit, expired-row-replay, invalid-uuid-rejection, and concurrent-call (FOR UPDATE).

## Files (scope)
- packages/idempotency/src/with-idempotency.ts [create]
- packages/idempotency/package.json [create]
- packages/db/migrations/NNNN_idempotency_cache.sql [create]
- packages/idempotency/src/__tests__/with-idempotency.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given fn runs once and returns {id:'X'}, when withIdempotency called twice with same transaction_id within 1h, then both return identical {id:'X'} and fn invoked exactly once
2. Given an invalid (non UUID v7) transaction_id, when withIdempotency invoked, then throws ValidationError with code 'INVALID_TRANSACTION_ID'
3. Given expires_at is past, when withIdempotency called with same transaction_id, then fn re-invoked (cache miss) and new row replaces stale

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/idempotency/src/__tests__/with-idempotency.test.ts asserting cache-hit + invalid-uuid + expiry-replay before with-idempotency.ts exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter idempotency test'

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip UUID v7 validation (R14 contract)
- Do not cache on error (only successful responses)
- Do not skip RLS (idempotency_cache rows leak across tenants if tenant_id missing — include tenant_id in PK)

pipeline_inputs.description: Server-side R14 idempotency helper with 1h Postgres-backed cache and UUID v7 validation.
pipeline_inputs.details: Single function `withIdempotency(transaction_id, fn)`. Storage table idempotency_cache (transaction_id UUID + tenant_id composite PK, response JSONB, expires_at). Cache only successes. Reject non-UUIDv7. Concurrent calls use FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED so duplicate replay during in-flight returns the in-flight result.
out_of_scope: Do not integrate with specific WO endpoints in this task (separate tasks)
Do not implement client-side UUID v7 generator (browser package)
Do not extend cache beyond 1 hour
acceptance_criteria: Given two replays within 1h with same transaction_id, when called, then identical response returned and fn invoked exactly once
Given non-UUIDv7 transaction_id, when called, then ValidationError 'INVALID_TRANSACTION_ID' thrown
Given expired cache entry, when re-called, then fn re-invoked and new row replaces stale
test_strategy: RED: unit test asserting cache hit + invalid uuid + expiry before helper exists
risk_red_lines: Do not skip UUID v7 validation
Do not skip tenant_id in cache PK
